questions.question: Describe the main advantages of the Chalk and Talk method over other teaching methods.
questions.hint: Explain how Chalk and Talk method facilitates teacher-student interaction.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of using PowerPoint Presentations in teaching?
questions.hint: Explain how PowerPoint enhances the learning experience for students.

questions.question: Compare and contrast the Chalk and Talk method with the PowerPoint Presentation method in terms of student engagement.
questions.hint: Discuss the pros and cons of each method in promoting student participation.
